run_purpose: Observe raw OCR pipeline (presence flags, noise, temporal windows); requires Tesseract on PATH. No assertions.

cases.expected_behavior: Screenshot under gameplay/ with clear HUD-style text → OCR returns non-empty raw_text; ocr_presence_flags may include ui_text_detected when heuristics match.
Solid-color image → very little or empty OCR; expect ocr_low_text_density or sparse items.
High-noise RGB image → garbled or empty OCR; expect ocr_low_text_density and/or read noise.
Visual OCR without runtime.log files → ocr_text_without_runtime_context in ocr_noise_flags when items exist.

OCR on screenshot + runtime log + video frame timestamps in one 5s window → temporal_groups include ocr_text alongside video_frame/runtime_log; optional ocr_text_within_same_temporal_window_as_video_frame in reasoning.
